name: Party Pack

black.text: The party don't start till ____ walks in.
I got kicked out of the group chat for ____.
The real reason we're all here tonight is ____.
Nothing ruins a road trip like ____.
____ + ____ = the worst decision of my life.
The group project failed because of ____.
I told the bouncer ____ and somehow it worked.
First we do ____, then we do ____, then we deny everything.
The neighbors called the cops about ____.
My therapist and I are still working through ____.
What did I find in the fridge at 3am?

white: one aggressively confident guy named Chad
a group chat that never sleeps
a playlist that's just one song 40 times
a dog wearing a tiny business suit
existential dread but make it fun
a group of pigeons with a plan
the confidence of a man who cannot swim
three energy drinks and a dream
a very serious game of the floor is lava
a raccoon going through my life choices
a group photo where everyone blinked
the last brain cell we all share
a plan that was doomed from the start
a text I definitely should not have sent
